# A-Z Trucksales - Truck Sales Website

## Company Overview
A-Z Trucksales - Premium truck dealership offering new and used commercial vehicles, parts, and services.

## Services
- New and used truck sales
- Truck parts and spares
- Special deals on commercial vehicles
- Vehicle financing options

## Contact
- Website: https://www.a-ztrucksales.com
- Location: South Africa
- Phone: Available on website

## Pages
- / - Homepage
- /inventory - Browse trucks and commercial vehicles
- /spares - Truck parts and accessories
- /specials - Special offers and deals
- /sell-your-truck - Sell your truck to us
- /contact - Contact us
- /login - Dealer login

## Vehicle Categories
- Tipper trucks
- Flatbed trucks
- Crane trucks
- Tankers
- Trailers
- Commercial vehicles

## Parts Categories
- Engine parts
- Transmission parts
- Body parts
- Suspension parts
- Electrical parts
